revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-520

Pulse duration coding (in a transponder)

Alternative terms: Pulse length coding (in a transponder), Width coding (in a transponder)

A method of modifying the duration of the pulses emitted from the transponder in accordance with a pre-arranged code for identification purposes.

Reference: B.S. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
